Dewpider

#0750 Mudsdale #0752 Araquanid
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Dewpider is a Water/Bug type Pokémon introduced in Generation 7.

Dewpider

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0751
Type Water Bug
Species Water Bubble Pokémon
Height 0.3 m (1′00″)
Weight 4.0 kg (8.8 lbs)
Abilities 1. Water Bubble
Water Absorb (hidden ability)
Local № 0141 (Sun/Moon — Alola dex)
0174 (U.Sun/U.Moon — Alola dex)
0214 (Sword/Shield)
0091 (The Crown Tundra)
0090 (The Indigo Disk)

Training

EV yield 1 Sp. Def
Catch rate 200 (26.1% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 54
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Bug, Water 1
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 15 (3,599–3,855 steps)

Speed 27
53 168
Total 269 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0751
Dewpider
Water · Bug
(Level 22)
#0752
Araquanid
Water · Bug

Dewpider changes

  • In Generation 7, Dewpider has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Sun It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its soft head.
Moon When it comes across enemies or potential prey, this Pokémon smashes its water-bubble-covered head into them.
Ultra Sun When two Dewpider meet, they display their water bubbles to each other. Then the one with the smaller bubble gets out of the other’s way.
Ultra Moon It can only breathe oxygen that has dissolved in water, so it wears a water bubble on its head when it walks around on land.
Sword It forms a water bubble at the rear of its body and then covers its head with it. Meeting another Dewpider means comparing water-bubble sizes.
Shield Dewpider normally lives underwater. When it comes onto land in search of food, it takes water with it in the form of a bubble on its head.

Moves learned by Dewpider

  • In other generations
  • 7
  • 8
  • 9
Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Dewpider does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Dewpider cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
